title: Embeddings & Representation Learning
summary: Mapping discrete or high-dimensional inputs to dense, learned vector spaces where geometry encodes meaning. Token embeddings, word2vec, sentence embeddings. The quality of the embedding geometry determines what downstream models can learn. Foundational to transformers, retrieval systems, and knowledge graphs.

mathematical_core.lookup: E = W_embed[token_id] — row lookup, not matrix multiply. W_embed ∈ [V, d_model]
mathematical_core.similarity: cos(E_a, E_b) = E_a · E_b / (||E_a|| · ||E_b||) — cosine similarity in embedding space
mathematical_core.word2vec_insight: king - man + woman ≈ queen — arithmetic in embedding space encodes semantic relationships

related: TRANSFORMER.VARIANTS — encoder-only models as embedding generators
FOUNDATIONS.INDUCTIVE_BIAS — embedding geometry is learned structure

notes: Connects to knowledge graph interest: graph node embeddings serve as K/V in cross-attention
